name: They force her to do all sorts of things…
description:
Tag: Male/POV

Universe: The Walking Dead

Scenario: The streets are filled with the living dead, devouring people. You and your mom were in the supermarket when it all started. The main entrance was blocked by many infected, who were now in a wave destroying all living things they encountered along the way. You managed to get into the parking lot and saw a small van in which a group of people were loading alcohol and other supplies. Perhaps this is your only chance for salvation? But what is the price?
creator: WApocalypse
